verdict.note: 3-run cycle in this adopted worktree: no-bundle exit 0 'No double-delivery'; planted spexcode bundle (plugin.json name + dispatch.sh hook + taste SKILL.md) -> exit 1, claude flagged on all 3 axes (srcs 2, hooks 2, taste x2), codex ok, 3 repair options; bundle removed -> exit 0 again
via new spex doctor --conflicts: exit 0 clean -> exit 1 with delivery-srcs 2 + hooks 2 + skill distill x2 CONFLICT + repair menu -> exit 0 after bundle removed

re-measure after doctor.ts gained the --migrate dispatch: single-channel exit 0 → planted spexcode bundle exits 1 flagging claude on all three stamped channels (srcs 2, hooks→dispatch 2, taste ×2; codex single) with repair options → exit 0 after removal
